creator: xaa@timewasters.nl
text:
The wise Peter Pentchev produced the following lines:
> On Wed, Feb 21, 2001 at 10:11:37AM +0100, xaa@timewasters.nl wrote:
> > 
> > >Number:         25246
> > >Category:       ports
> > >Synopsis:       maintainer upgrade to 1.4.4
> > >Originator:     Mark Huizer; Eindhoven
> > >Release:        FreeBSD 5.0-CURRENT i386
> > >Organization:
> > Madison Gurkha BV
> > >Environment:
> > System: FreeBSD eeyore.local.dohd.org 5.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 5.0-CURRENT #0: Tue Jan 30 19:19:31 MET 2001 xaa@eeyore.local.dohd.org:/usr2/sources/src/sys/compile/eeyore i386
> 
> While we're at it, what do you think about the attached patch, which includes
> yours and also adds NOPORTDOCS handling?

Yep,sounds reasonable.

Mark
> 
> G'luck,
> Peter
> 
> -- 
> This sentence every third, but it still comprehensible.
> 
> Index: ports/devel/libslang/Makefile
> ===================================================================
> RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/devel/libslang/Makefile,v
> retrieving revision 1.25
> diff -u -r1.25 Makefile
> --- ports/devel/libslang/Makefile	2001/02/05 13:19:39	1.25
> +++ ports/devel/libslang/Makefile	2001/02/21 10:12:19
> @@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
>  #
>  
>  PORTNAME=	libslang
> -PORTVERSION=	1.4.3
> +PORTVERSION=	1.4.4
>  CATEGORIES=	devel
>  MASTER_SITES=	ftp://space.mit.edu/pub/davis/slang/v1.4/
>  DISTNAME=	slang-${PORTVERSION}
> @@ -19,5 +19,10 @@
>  
>  ALL_TARGET=	all elf
>  INSTALL_TARGET=	install install-elf
> +
> +.if		!defined(NOPORTDOCS)
> +post-install:
> +		cd ${WRKSRC}/src && ${MAKE} install_docs
> +.endif
>  
>  .include <bsd.port.mk>
> Index: ports/devel/libslang/distinfo
> ===================================================================
> RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/devel/libslang/distinfo,v
> retrieving revision 1.10
> diff -u -r1.10 distinfo
> --- ports/devel/libslang/distinfo	2001/02/05 13:19:39	1.10
> +++ ports/devel/libslang/distinfo	2001/02/21 10:12:19
> @@ -1 +1 @@
> -MD5 (slang-1.4.3.tar.bz2) = 3ccadbb4fbd8154049f4c73dab899d92
> +MD5 (slang-1.4.4.tar.bz2) = a79b7e57efb8d56a80048144a73ba909
> Index: ports/devel/libslang/pkg-plist
> ===================================================================
> RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/devel/libslang/pkg-plist,v
> retrieving revision 1.15
> diff -u -r1.15 pkg-plist
> --- ports/devel/libslang/pkg-plist	2001/02/05 13:19:39	1.15
> +++ ports/devel/libslang/pkg-plist	2001/02/21 10:12:19
> @@ -3,14 +3,14 @@
>  lib/libslang.a
>  lib/libslang.so
>  lib/libslang.so.1.4
> -share/doc/slang/COPYING
> -share/doc/slang/COPYING.ART
> -share/doc/slang/COPYING.GPL
> -share/doc/slang/COPYRIGHT
> -share/doc/slang/changes.txt
> -share/doc/slang/cref.txt
> -share/doc/slang/cslang.txt
> -share/doc/slang/slang.txt
> -share/doc/slang/slangdoc.html
> -share/doc/slang/slangfun.txt
> -@dirrm share/doc/slang
> +%%PORTDOCS%%share/doc/slang/COPYING
> +%%PORTDOCS%%share/doc/slang/COPYING.ART
> +%%PORTDOCS%%share/doc/slang/COPYING.GPL
> +%%PORTDOCS%%share/doc/slang/COPYRIGHT
> +%%PORTDOCS%%share/doc/slang/changes.txt
> +%%PORTDOCS%%share/doc/slang/cref.txt
> +%%PORTDOCS%%share/doc/slang/cslang.txt
> +%%PORTDOCS%%share/doc/slang/slang.txt
> +%%PORTDOCS%%share/doc/slang/slangdoc.html
> +%%PORTDOCS%%share/doc/slang/slangfun.txt
> +%%PORTDOCS%%@dirrm share/doc/slang
> Index: ports/devel/libslang/files/patch-ae
> ===================================================================
> RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/devel/libslang/files/patch-ae,v
> retrieving revision 1.2
> diff -u -r1.2 patch-ae
> --- ports/devel/libslang/files/patch-ae	2001/02/05 13:19:41	1.2
> +++ ports/devel/libslang/files/patch-ae	2001/02/21 10:12:19
> @@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
> ---- src/Makefile.in.orig	Mon Jan 24 13:38:33 2000
> -+++ src/Makefile.in	Mon Jan 24 13:38:41 2000
> +--- src/Makefile.in.old	Wed Feb 21 11:57:28 2001
> ++++ src/Makefile.in	Wed Feb 21 11:57:58 2001
>  @@ -36,7 +36,7 @@
>   exec_prefix = @exec_prefix@
>   install_lib_dir = @libdir@
> @@ -7,5 +7,14 @@
>  -install_doc_dir = $(prefix)/doc/slang
>  +install_doc_dir = $(prefix)/share/doc/slang
>   DOC_FILES = ../changes.txt ../COPY* ../doc/slangdoc.html ../doc/text/*.txt
> + MODULE_INSTALL_DIR = @libdir@/slang/modules
>   #---------------------------------------------------------------------------
> - # Misc commands (safe to leave these untouched)
> +@@ -138,7 +138,7 @@
> + #---------------------------------------------------------------------------
> + # Intallation rules
> + #---------------------------------------------------------------------------
> +-install: install_basic_lib install_docs
> ++install: install_basic_lib
> + install_basic_lib: $(DEST_LIBDIR) $(DEST_INCDIR) $(OBJDIR_NORMAL_LIB)
> + 	@echo installing $(OBJDIR_NORMAL_LIB) in $(DEST_LIBDIR)
> + 	$(INSTALL_DATA) $(OBJDIR_NORMAL_LIB) $(DEST_LIBDIR)

-- 
 Mark Huizer - mark@madison-gurkha.com - xaa@timewasters.nl - xaa@dohd.org

 If you think the problem is bad now, just wait till we solve  it.
